G : Type u_1

K : Type u_2
inst✝⁹ : CommRing K
inst✝⁸ : ValuativeRel K
L : Type u_3

inst✝⁶ : ValuativeRel L
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace L
inst✝⁴ : IsNonarchimedeanLocalField L
inst✝³ : Algebra K L

inst✝ : IsGaloisGroup G K L
⊢ FaithfulSMul G ↥(valuation L).integer

failed_attempts:
⟨fun {g₁ g₂} h => FaithfulSMul.eq_of_smul_eq_smul (α := L) fun x => by
    by_cases hx : valuation L x ≤ 1
    · exact congrArg Subtype.val (h ⟨x, Valuation.mem_integer_iff.mpr hx⟩)
    · push_neg at hx
      have hxne : x ≠ 0 := fun h => by simp

⟨fun {g h} H => FaithfulSMul.eq_of_smul_eq_smul (α := L) fun x => by
    by_cases hx : x = 0
    · simp [hx]
    · have hxinv : x⁻¹ ≠ 0 := inv_ne_zero hx
      by_cases hv : valuation L x ≤ 1
      · have hx_int : x ∈ (valuation L).integer := Valuation.mem_integer_iff.mpr hv
        exact congrArg Subtype.val (H ⟨x, hx_int⟩)
      · push_neg at hv
        have hvinv : valuation L x⁻¹ ≤ 1 := by
          rw [map_inv₀]
          exact inv_le_one_of_one_le₀ (le_of_lt hv)
        have hxinv_int : x⁻¹ ∈ (valuation L).integer := Valuation.mem_integer_iff.mpr hvinv
        have := congrArg Subtype.val (H ⟨x⁻¹, hxinv_int⟩)
        simp only at

⟨fun h => eq_of_smul_eq_smul (α := L) fun x => by
    have : ∀ y : 𝒪[L], _ • y = _ • y :=

⟨fun {g₁ g₂} h => FaithfulSMul.eq_of_smul_eq_smul (M := L) fun x => by
    have h1 := h ⟨1, by simp

⟨fun h => FaithfulSMul.eq_of_smul_eq_smul (M := L) fun x => by
    have : (1 : 𝒪[L]) = ⟨1, by simp

⟨fun {g h} H => FaithfulSMul.eq_of_smul_eq_smul (M := L) fun x => by
    have hval : valuation L x⁻¹ * valuation L x = valuation L 1 := by simp
